Function.Inference: Introduction section ending with a loop start sign |: at bar 4.
Main looping body spanning from the start of the repeat to the end repeat sign :| at bar 48.

Section.Inference: Introductory material establishing the rhythmic feel and building up to the main theme.
First statement of the main theme.
Direct repeat of the main theme with slight harmonic and textural variations in the accompaniment.
A contrasting section introducing a fundamentally new musical idea and melody.
A rhythmic section with repeated motifs building tension to lead back to the start of the loop.
